name: Lofa County (Liberia)
description: Solid green field with the Liberian national flag as a canton in the upper hoist; in the fly half stands a stylised brown traditional human figure representing the people of Lofa.
history: Presented by President William V. S. Tubman on 29 November 1965 together with the flags of the other Liberian counties.

features.symbolism: Lofa as part of the Republic of Liberia
the people and traditional culture of Lofa County
